title: Remove Duplicate Letters
hints: Consider processing the string left-to-right, deciding for each character whether to keep it or discard it based on future occurrences.
Use a stack to build the result. If the current character is smaller than the top of the stack, you might pop the top if it appears later in the string.
Only pop from the stack if the top character appears again later. This ensures you can still form a valid result while achieving lexicographical order.
